title: ClearLagPlus
description: Lightweight Forge ClearLag mod with full control and multilingual support.
body:
**ClearLagPlus** is a simple but powerful optimization mod designed to automatically clear unwanted entities from your server to maintain performance and reduce lag.

**🔹 Features:**

**Automatically clears mobs and dropped items at a configurable interval.**

**Protects important entities: players, pets, armor stands, and custom-named mobs.**

**Fully customizable clear delay via config file or commands.**

**In-game commands to add or remove entities or entire mods from the exclusion list.**

**Safe: excluded entities and mods are protected from accidental removal.**

**Lightweight and built for high compatibility with other mods.**

**🔹 Commands:**

/clearlag settime <minutes> — **Change the interval dynamically in-game.**

/clearlag now — **Instantly perform a clear manually.**

/clearlag exclude add <modid:entity> — **Exclude specific entities or mods.**

/clearlag exclude remove <modid:entity> — **Remove exclusions.**

/clearlag exclude list — **View all excluded entities.**

and more.

Perfect for survival servers, modded packs, and public multiplayer worlds where performance and control are crucial!
